SHOULD I BE CONCERND WITH THIS? WHEN I WAS LITTLE I HAD FREQUENT UTI S, IM NOT SURE IF IT HAS ANY THING TO DO WITH EACH OTHER.

I had an epidural steroid/ cortisone injection for sciatic nerve / back pain this morning - after dinner and glass of white wine - my heart started racing - this has happened in the past but only after running / exercise - my heart rate now is about 135 BPR - any connection with the injection and rapid heart rate - 66 year old white male.

What happens to an AST tenant when their landlord defaults on his mortgage?
Larry buys a property on a mortgage and then lets it to Tim on a AST. Larry then defaults on his mortgage and the bank proceeds to repossess the property that is housing Tim. What is the process and timeframes for this? Is there any reason why the bank would or could not repossess the property with Tim residing as a sitting tenant? In short, what happens to Tim’s AST?

signature.instructions:
You are a highly accurate text classifier. Your task is to categorize queries
into one of four predefined domains. The ONLY valid categories are: law, finance, healthcare, ood
Any query that does not clearly belong to the domains above MUST be categorized as ood. 
You must respond with ONLY the category name, and nothing else. No explanations, no extra words.

fields.description: The predicted category. If the query does not clearly belong to category - law, finance, healthcare. Predict 'ood'.
